name: Thousand Trails Peace River RV & Camping Resort
description: Thousand Trails Peace River RV & Camping Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wauchula, FL. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Torrey Trails RV & Golf Resort
description: Torrey Trails RV & Golf Resort is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, FL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
